benefits.description: QSC and Arctic sources provided measurable appetite suppression. Original MJ pens from Walgreens in April also effective.

protocol_notes: Multi-week experience with QSC and Arctic semaglutide. Recently tried genuine MJ 10mg pen from CVS which did not perform as well as previous QSC/Arctic or original Walgreens MJ pens from April. Notes that GLP-1 medications cause dynamic body chemistry changes (reduced blood sugar, increased insulin production, reduced liver enzymes, reduced caloric intake) that affect dose-to-dose response variation.
